description: Perform a manual Oaxaca-Blinder decomposition on the 'food.gdt' dataset to analyze the food expenditure gap between High Income (income > 20) and Low Income households. Calculate the Total Gap, the Explained (Endowment) Effect using High Income coefficients as the reference, and the Unexplained (Coefficient) Effect based on OLS regressions of 'food_exp' on 'income'. Save the results in 'KEY=VALUE' format to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/oaxaca_results.txt and save the script to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/oaxaca_script.inp.
